args:
set -eu
plan_txt=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan)
explain_txt=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain)
doctor_txt=$(cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor)
printf '%s' "$plan_txt" | grep -q '^plan '
printf '%s' "$explain_txt" | grep -q 'request contract:'
printf '%s' "$doctor_txt" | grep -q '^host os='
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan --format json | jq -e '.structural_identity.plan_identity' >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json | jq -e '.verification.status' >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- doctor --format json | jq -e '.operating_system' >/dev/null
printf 'fuzz-cli-output-modes\n'
